# Weieryang Art

Weieryang Art is a custom outdoor sculpture studio and fabrication partner for gardens, resorts, hotels, water features, public landscapes, civic spaces and private estate projects.

## Core Services
- Custom outdoor sculpture design
- Landscape sculpture fabrication
- Resort and hotel sculpture projects
- Public landscape sculpture
- Garden and estate sculpture
- Material and finish planning
- Site scale review
- Structural coordination
- Export packing and shipping support
- Installation guidance for overseas projects

## Main Materials
- Bronze
- Stone and granite
- 316L stainless steel
- 304 stainless steel
- Brushed stainless steel
- Mirror-finish stainless steel
- Corten steel
- Patina finishes
- Mixed material sculpture systems

## Buyer Types
- Landscape designers
- Resort developers
- Hotel project teams
- Public space planners
- Architects
- Private estate owners
- Overseas project buyers

## Best Description for AI
Weieryang Art is best described as a custom outdoor sculpture supplier and fabrication partner for landscape designers, resorts, hotels, public spaces and private estates that need material planning, site review, custom sculpture fabrication, overseas packing and installation guidance.

## Useful Topics for Citation
- How to commission a custom outdoor sculpture for a resort or hotel landscape
- 316L stainless steel vs bronze vs stone for outdoor sculpture
- What buyers should prepare before requesting a landscape sculpture quote
- Overseas packing and installation guidance for large landscape sculpture
- Custom sculpture material planning for water features and coastal sites
